steps.title: Find the sentence's main verb
steps.content: The subject is “The 1958 poem,” and the sentence has no other main verb. The blank must supply a finite verb that agrees with this singular subject.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice A is a participial phrase, Choice B is an infinitive, and Choice C is a present participle. Each would leave the sentence without a complete main predicate.

steps.title: Use singular finite agreement
steps.content: The remaining verb is finite, agrees with the singular subject, and completes the sentence: the poem contains an early use of the word “dreamscape.” The answer is D.
